linkedin_signals.snippet: Obsidian was a successful awardee of the Nuclear Regulatory Commission’s (NRC) Development and Integration Vehicle for Applications (DIVA) Blanket Purchase Agreement, the Department of Treasury’s PROTECTS (Providing Treasury Enterprise Cybersecurity Technology and Services) Blanket Purchase Agreement, and the U.S. General Services Administration (GSA) Polaris Government wide Acquisition Contract.

linkedin_signals.title: Obsidian 1.10: Faster Mobile App, New Features, and API - LinkedIn
linkedin_signals.snippet: Love the opening speed on mobile app.. ##### November Drop: Glean Desktop App. To view or add a comment, sign in. Apple’s new App Store web version offers a homepage and improved search, but a SourceMap left enabled exposed the full front-end source code, revealing state management and API details. Honestly, this is the fastest way to turn an idea into real web app Tutorial : https://lnkd.in/dJASM
